name: wildkin
description: Wildkin - browser isometric creature-sanctuary game (vertical slice). Creatures evolve based on how you raise and use them.

scripts.deploy:site: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('../games/wildkin',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync('dist','../games/wildkin',{recursive:true});console.log('Copied dist -> ../games/wildkin — commit and deploy the site as usual.');"
